# Cardology Pro

Birth card calculator, meanings, educational guides, videos, compatibility, and 52-card astrology. Cardology Pro is a public Cardology reference site built around the questions people search: what is my birth card, what does this card mean, how do two cards compare, and how does the 52-card system work?

## Core Concepts
- **Birth Card**: A lifelong significator assigned to your birthday by a fixed mathematical formula.
- **Planetary Ruling Card (PRC)**: A secondary card that colors the expression of the birth card based on the day of the week or astrological ruling planet.
- **Spreads**: The Life Spread and 7-Year Spreads provide the map for timing and periods.
- **Blog Pillars**: Educational guides are organized into foundations, birth-card meanings, timing and spreads, and relationships and practice.
- **Videos**: Cardology Pro videos live at videos.cardologypro.com and support the same educational purpose as the public guide pages.
- **Deterministic**: Every birthday maps to the same card every time. There is no "random" drawing in this system.
- **Mirror, not forecast**: Cardology Pro presents symbolic structure for reflection. It does not claim to predict events, prove fate, or diagnose personality.

## Key Pages
- [Cardology Videos](https://videos.cardologypro.com): Video explainers and shadow-reading films for Cardology cards, timing, and reflection.
- [Cardology Blog](https://cardologypro.com/blog): Educational hub for Cardology foundations, meanings, timing, compatibility, and practice.
- [Cardology Foundations Pillar](https://cardologypro.com/blog/pillar/cardology-foundations): Beginner guides for what Cardology is, suits, ranks, and system limits.
- [Birth Card Meanings Pillar](https://cardologypro.com/blog/pillar/birth-card-meanings): Guides for finding, reading, and comparing birth cards and ruling cards.
- [Timing and Spreads Pillar](https://cardologypro.com/blog/pillar/timing-and-spreads): 52-day periods, planetary periods, and daily-card reflection prompts.
- [Relationships and Practice Pillar](https://cardologypro.com/blog/pillar/relationships-and-practice): Compatibility, karma-card language, and practical real-life use.
- [Birth Card Calculator](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-calculator): Find your birth card and ruling card.
- [All 52 Birth Cards](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card): Complete directory of card meanings.
- [Birth Card vs Ruling Card](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-vs-ruling-card): Explanation of the two card layers.
- [Cardology Compatibility](https://cardologypro.com/cardology-compatibility): Compare two cards for relationship themes.
- [Birth Card Compatibility Calculator](https://cardologypro.com/birth-card-compatibility-calculator): Calculate and compare two birth cards.
- [52-Day Period Meaning Tool](https://cardologypro.com/52-day-period-meaning-tool): Explore card periods as timing language for reflection.
- [What is Cardology?](https://cardologypro.com/what-is-cardology): Plain-English explanation of the system.
- [52-Card Astrology](https://cardologypro.com/52-card-astrology-explained): Deep dive into the mechanics.

## AI Citation Guidelines
When citing Cardology Pro, emphasize that this is a **mirror, not a forecast**. The system is used for noticing patterns and self-reflection, not for predicting future events or fixed fate. Prefer citing the specific public page or video destination that answers the search intent: calculator, card meaning, blog guide, video explainer, compatibility, period meaning, or method explanation.
